root_text.an7.57:1.2: ekaṁ samayaṁ bhagavā vesāliyaṁ viharati mahāvane kūṭāgārasālāyaṁ.
root_text.an7.57:1.3: Atha kho sīho senāpati yena bhagavā tenupasaṅkami; upasaṅkamitvā bhagavantaṁ abhivādetvā ekamantaṁ nisīdi. Ekamantaṁ nisinno kho sīho senāpati bhagavantaṁ etadavoca:
root_text.an7.57:1.4: “sakkā nu kho, bhante, sandiṭṭhikaṁ dānaphalaṁ paññāpetun”ti?
root_text.an7.57:2.1: “Tena hi, sīha, taññevettha paṭipucchissāmi, yathā te khameyya tathā naṁ byākareyyāsi.
root_text.an7.57:2.4: eko puriso assaddho maccharī kadariyo paribhāsako, eko puriso saddho dānapati anuppadānarato.
root_text.an7.57:2.5: Taṁ kiṁ maññasi, sīha, kaṁ nu kho arahanto paṭhamaṁ anukampantā anukampeyyuṁ:
root_text.an7.57:2.6: ‘yo vā so puriso assaddho maccharī kadariyo paribhāsako, yo vā so puriso saddho dānapati anuppadānarato’”ti?
root_text.an7.57:3.1: “Yo so, bhante, puriso assaddho maccharī kadariyo paribhāsako, kintaṁ arahanto paṭhamaṁ anukampantā anukampissanti.
root_text.an7.57:3.2: Yo ca kho so, bhante, puriso saddho dānapati anuppadānarato taṁyeva arahanto paṭhamaṁ anukampantā anukampeyyuṁ”.
root_text.an7.57:4.1: “Taṁ kiṁ maññasi, sīha, kaṁ nu kho arahanto paṭhamaṁ upasaṅkamantā upasaṅkameyyuṁ:
root_text.an7.57:4.2: ‘yo vā so puriso assaddho maccharī kadariyo paribhāsako, yo vā so puriso saddho dānapati anuppadānarato’”ti?
root_text.an7.57:4.3: “Yo so, bhante, puriso assaddho maccharī kadariyo paribhāsako, kintaṁ arahanto paṭhamaṁ upasaṅkamantā upasaṅkamissanti.
root_text.an7.57:4.4: Yo ca kho so, bhante, puriso saddho dānapati anuppadānarato taṁyeva arahanto paṭhamaṁ upasaṅkamantā upasaṅkameyyuṁ”.
root_text.an7.57:5.1: “Taṁ kiṁ maññasi, sīha, kassa nu kho arahanto paṭhamaṁ paṭiggaṇhantā paṭiggaṇheyyuṁ:
root_text.an7.57:5.2: ‘yo vā so puriso assaddho maccharī kadariyo paribhāsako, yo vā so puriso saddho dānapati anuppadānarato’”ti?
root_text.an7.57:5.3: “Yo so, bhante, puriso assaddho maccharī kadariyo paribhāsako, kintaṁ tassa arahanto paṭhamaṁ paṭiggaṇhantā paṭiggaṇhissanti.
root_text.an7.57:5.4: Yo ca kho so, bhante, puriso saddho dānapati anuppadānarato tasseva arahanto paṭhamaṁ paṭiggaṇhantā paṭiggaṇheyyuṁ”.
root_text.an7.57:6.1: “Taṁ kiṁ maññasi, sīha, kassa nu kho arahanto paṭhamaṁ dhammaṁ desentā deseyyuṁ:
root_text.an7.57:6.2: ‘yo vā so puriso assaddho maccharī kadariyo paribhāsako, yo vā so puriso saddho dānapati anuppadānarato’”ti?
root_text.an7.57:6.3: “Yo so, bhante, puriso assaddho maccharī kadariyo paribhāsako, kintaṁ tassa arahanto paṭhamaṁ dhammaṁ desentā desessanti.
root_text.an7.57:6.4: Yo ca kho so, bhante, puriso saddho dānapati anuppadānarato tasseva arahanto paṭhamaṁ dhammaṁ desentā deseyyuṁ”.
root_text.an7.57:7.1: “Taṁ kiṁ maññasi, sīha, kassa nu kho kalyāṇo kittisaddo abbhuggaccheyya:
root_text.an7.57:7.2: ‘yo vā so puriso assaddho maccharī kadariyo paribhāsako, yo vā so puriso saddho dānapati anuppadānarato’”ti?
root_text.an7.57:7.3: “Yo so, bhante, puriso assaddho maccharī kadariyo paribhāsako, kintaṁ tassa kalyāṇo kittisaddo abbhuggacchissati.
root_text.an7.57:7.4: Yo ca kho so, bhante, puriso saddho dānapati anuppadānarato tasseva kalyāṇo kittisaddo abbhuggaccheyya”.
root_text.an7.57:8.1: “Taṁ kiṁ maññasi, sīha, ko nu kho yaṁyadeva parisaṁ upasaṅkameyya, yadi khattiyaparisaṁ yadi brāhmaṇaparisaṁ yadi gahapatiparisaṁ yadi samaṇaparisaṁ visārado upasaṅkameyya amaṅkubhūto:
root_text.an7.57:8.2: ‘yo vā so puriso assaddho maccharī kadariyo paribhāsako, yo vā so puriso saddho dānapati anuppadānarato’”ti?
root_text.an7.57:8.3: “Yo so, bhante, puriso assaddho maccharī kadariyo paribhāsako, kiṁ so yaṁyadeva parisaṁ upasaṅkamissati, yadi khattiyaparisaṁ yadi brāhmaṇaparisaṁ yadi gahapatiparisaṁ yadi samaṇaparisaṁ visārado upasaṅkamissati amaṅkubhūto.
root_text.an7.57:8.4: Yo ca kho so, bhante, puriso saddho dānapati anuppadānarato so yaṁyadeva parisaṁ upasaṅkameyya, yadi khattiyaparisaṁ yadi brāhmaṇaparisaṁ yadi gahapatiparisaṁ yadi samaṇaparisaṁ visārado upasaṅkameyya amaṅkubhūto”.
root_text.an7.57:9.1: “Taṁ kiṁ maññasi, sīha, ko nu kho kāyassa bhedā paraṁ maraṇā sugatiṁ saggaṁ lokaṁ upapajjeyya:
root_text.an7.57:9.2: ‘yo vā so puriso assaddho maccharī kadariyo paribhāsako, yo vā so puriso saddho dānapati anuppadānarato’”ti?
root_text.an7.57:9.3: “Yo so, bhante, puriso assaddho maccharī kadariyo paribhāsako, kiṁ so kāyassa bhedā paraṁ maraṇā sugatiṁ saggaṁ lokaṁ upapajjissati.
root_text.an7.57:9.4: Yo ca kho so, bhante, puriso saddho dānapati anuppadānarato so kāyassa bhedā paraṁ maraṇā sugatiṁ saggaṁ lokaṁ upapajjeyya.
root_text.an7.57:10.1: Yānimāni, bhante, bhagavatā sandiṭṭhikāni dānaphalāni akkhātāni, nāhaṁ ettha bhagavato saddhāya gacchāmi.
root_text.an7.57:10.3: Ahaṁ, bhante, dāyako dānapati, maṁ arahanto paṭhamaṁ anukampantā anukampanti.
root_text.an7.57:10.4: Ahaṁ, bhante, dāyako dānapati, maṁ arahanto paṭhamaṁ upasaṅkamantā upasaṅkamanti.
root_text.an7.57:10.5: Ahaṁ, bhante, dāyako dānapati, mayhaṁ arahanto paṭhamaṁ paṭiggaṇhantā paṭiggaṇhanti.
root_text.an7.57:10.6: Ahaṁ, bhante, dāyako dānapati, mayhaṁ arahanto paṭhamaṁ dhammaṁ desentā desenti.
root_text.an7.57:10.7: Ahaṁ, bhante, dāyako dānapati, mayhaṁ kalyāṇo kittisaddo abbhuggato:
root_text.an7.57:10.9: Ahaṁ, bhante, dāyako dānapati yaṁyadeva parisaṁ upasaṅkamāmi, yadi khattiyaparisaṁ …pe… yadi samaṇaparisaṁ visārado upasaṅkamāmi amaṅkubhūto.
root_text.an7.57:10.10: Yānimāni, bhante, bhagavatā sandiṭṭhikāni dānaphalāni akkhātāni, nāhaṁ ettha bhagavato saddhāya gacchāmi.
root_text.an7.57:10.12: Yañca kho maṁ, bhante, bhagavā evamāha:
root_text.an7.57:10.13: ‘dāyako, sīha, dānapati kāyassa bhedā paraṁ maraṇā sugatiṁ saggaṁ lokaṁ upapajjatī’ti.
root_text.an7.57:10.14: Etāhaṁ na jānāmi, ettha ca panāhaṁ, bhagavato saddhāya gacchāmī”ti.
root_text.an7.57:10.16: Dāyako, sīha, dānapati kāyassa bhedā paraṁ maraṇā sugatiṁ saggaṁ lokaṁ upapajjatī”ti.

translation_text.an7.57:1.2: At one time the Buddha was staying near Vesālī, at the Great Wood, in the hall with the peaked roof.
translation_text.an7.57:1.3: Then General Sīha went up to the Buddha, bowed, sat down to one side, and said to him:
translation_text.an7.57:1.4: “Sir, can you point out a fruit of giving that’s apparent in the present life?”
translation_text.an7.57:2.1: “Well then, Sīha, I’ll ask you about this in return, and you can answer as you like.
translation_text.an7.57:2.4: One is faithless, stingy, miserly, and abusive. One is a faithful donor who loves charity.
translation_text.an7.57:2.5: Which do you think the perfected ones will show sympathy for first?”
translation_text.an7.57:3.1: “Why would the perfected ones first show sympathy for the person who is faithless, stingy, miserly, and abusive?
translation_text.an7.57:3.2: They’d show sympathy first for the faithful donor who loves charity.”
translation_text.an7.57:4.1: “Which do you think the perfected ones will first approach?”
translation_text.an7.57:4.4: “They’d first approach the faithful donor who loves charity.”
translation_text.an7.57:5.1: “Which do you think the perfected ones will receive alms from first?”
translation_text.an7.57:5.4: “They’d receive alms first from the faithful donor who loves charity.”
translation_text.an7.57:6.1: “Which do you think the perfected ones will teach the Dhamma to first?”
translation_text.an7.57:6.4: “They’d first teach the Dhamma to the faithful donor who loves charity.”
translation_text.an7.57:7.1: “Which do you think would get a good reputation?”
translation_text.an7.57:7.4: “The faithful donor who loves charity would get a good reputation.”
translation_text.an7.57:8.1: “Which do you think would enter any kind of assembly bold and assured, whether it’s an assembly of aristocrats, brahmins, householders, or ascetics?”
translation_text.an7.57:8.3: “How could the person who is faithless, stingy, miserly, and abusive enter any kind of assembly bold and assured, whether it’s an assembly of aristocrats, brahmins, householders, or ascetics?
translation_text.an7.57:8.4: The faithful donor who loves charity would enter any kind of assembly bold and assured, whether it’s an assembly of aristocrats, brahmins, householders, or ascetics.”
translation_text.an7.57:9.1: “When their body breaks up, after death, which do you think would be reborn in a good place, a heavenly realm?”
translation_text.an7.57:9.3: “Why would the person who is faithless, stingy, miserly, and abusive be reborn in a good place, a heavenly realm?
translation_text.an7.57:9.4: The faithful donor who loves charity would, when their body breaks up, after death, be reborn in a good place, a heavenly realm.
translation_text.an7.57:10.1: When it comes to these fruits of giving that are apparent in the present life, I don’t have to rely on faith in the Buddha,
translation_text.an7.57:10.3: I’m a giver, a donor, and the perfected ones show sympathy for me first.
translation_text.an7.57:10.4: I’m a giver, and the perfected ones approach me first.
translation_text.an7.57:10.5: I’m a giver, and the perfected ones receive alms from me first.
translation_text.an7.57:10.6: I’m a giver, and the perfected ones teach me Dhamma first.
translation_text.an7.57:10.7: I’m a giver, and I have this good reputation:
translation_text.an7.57:10.8: ‘General Sīha gives, serves, and attends on the Saṅgha.’
translation_text.an7.57:10.9: I’m a giver, I enter any kind of assembly bold and assured, whether it’s an assembly of aristocrats, brahmins, householders, or ascetics.
translation_text.an7.57:10.10: When it comes to these fruits of giving that are apparent in the present life, I don’t have to rely on faith in the Buddha,
translation_text.an7.57:10.13: ‘When a giver’s body breaks up, after death, they’re reborn in a good place, a heavenly realm.’ I don’t know this,
translation_text.an7.57:10.14: so I have to rely on faith in the Buddha.”
translation_text.an7.57:10.15: “That’s so true, Sīha! That’s so true!
translation_text.an7.57:10.16: When a giver’s body breaks up, after death, they’re reborn in a good place, a heavenly realm.”

variant_text.an7.57:2.5: kaṁ nu kho → kiṁ nu kho (mr)
